property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25 in;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Zulu\zulu-24 in\;C:\Program Files\Amazon Corretto\jdk17.0.14_7 in;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.6.7-hotspot in;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer Chroma SDK in;C:\Program Files\Razer Chroma SDK in;C:\Program Files (x86)\Razer\ChromaBroadcast in;C:\Program Files\Razer\ChromaBroadcast in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Windows\system32\config\systemprofile\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Cloudflare\Cloudflare WARP\;C:\Program Files\Ambilight WiFi-USB in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local
vm;C:
vm4w
odejs;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;c:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;C:\Users\Admin\.local in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Roaming

pm;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity in;%MAVEN_HOME% in;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.13 in;c:\Users\Admin\.cursor\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5-universal undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: invalidLoginShouldShowErrorMessage
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: tc02_searchByUserRole_admin_showsOnlyAdminUsers

testcase.name: tc03_resetSearch_clearsFiltersAndRestoresList

failure.message: Reset did not restore list size as expected. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Reset did not restore list size as expected. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at testcase.name: tc10_usernameUniqueness_validationShownForDuplicate

failure.message: Username uniqueness error was not displayed as expected. expected [true] but found [false]
